name: Chicken Wars: Merge Guns
description: Welcome to the exciting world of chicken tower defense! With the power of merging, you can create even stronger chickens to protect against the enemys waves. Join the fight and show those attackers what our chickens are made of! Our brave feathered friends are under attack and they need your help to defend their lands. Hey there! Lets go!
instructions: Use MOUSE and LEFT-CLICK to interact with the buttons
tags: angry, angrybirds, Animal, Battle, Chicken, Gun, Shoot, Shooting, Tower Defense, War
